reviews.review_text: We phoned and booked late in the day for a powered site . Stayed 2 nights so we could go to Australia Zoo and this park is very close by . Staff were very helpful and accommodating. Amenities were spotlessly clean , grounds were very tidy . It was easy to park our motorhome on the site . There’s an outdoor deck seating area with bbq , It was nice to sit quietly in the afternoon watching kookaburras, yellow tail black cockatoos and enjoy the sunset . It’s a peaceful place . Friendly long term residents , suited us for our 2 night stay . Close to drive to iga for supplies .

This place is a time capsule, I'm imagining it was Stella in the 80s, but since then other than general maintenance, not much else has happened here... the drains are blocked, there's no hose or tap at the dump point, ew!.
It's clean, the staff seemed nice but this place needs a major face-lift. Full of elderly Permanent, some quite a bit potty. It's quaint, but not up to standard, needs help.
Also, ocean view, thin. I mean if you squint you can see water lol.
First night there, bad night sleep due to Tennant in cabins playing triple j till midnight, then came back on at 4am. Not sure what that was about but at least the second night they were quiet.
Passable spot, not the best.
A nice out of the way caravan park. Peaceful
fantastic park , amazing views , dog friendly , very quiet , clean amenities. friendly people .
Great little caravan n chalet park, little dated but amenities clean.

Excellent customer service friendly staff I found my powered site with ease due to the helpful locals highly recommended excellent amenities very clean and well presented I would definitely stay here again
Arrived to a warm welcome. Bit tight for parking up but we are still new to this life.
Lovely view and the entire park is wonderfully cared for. Ablutions superbly clean too.

Wonderful people who manage and operate the cabins and caravan park.
Five Stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Call, book online, Immediately!!!! 😀🌺🌻
the cheaper options were unavailable at short notice so we accepted the cabin at $225pn.  whilst it was clean, it was overpriced and i would seek other accommodation around the are
Nice small caravan park. Good amenities
Doe jezelf een plezier: DOE HET NIET! De prijs is gebaseerd op helemaal niets. $50 dollar; langs een drukke weg en verouderde faciliteiten.

This caravan park was ideally situated in the Glass Mountains area. 15 minutes to Maleny, 25 minutes to Montville. We used it as a base to explore. But be warned as soon as the sun starts to go down the flying beetles are out and the cane toads! Not much you can do . Unfortunately I am horrified by the number of  toads so went into my van by 6.15pm every night.

Convenient  close to Landsborough ... views occluded .. ground small tidy surrounded by high trees. Facilites clean, basic and old. Very expensive for basic camp ground. Road noise.. quietens at night.
Great place toilets and showers could of been better and up dated

Don’t camp here. No unpowered sites, so we had to pay $50/day for two nights for water/power we didn’t use. Unfortunately, it wasn’t worth it. It was by the busy road and the entrance. The amnesties was 100 m down a dark trip hazard road to only one dud cold shower (don’t expect it to be available either!). Not nice during winter. There is a fabulous new indoor camp kitchen which was LOCKED. There is an outdoor basement one for plebs. It wouldn’t have hurt so much if we didn’t know there was a nice clean empty one above us. They put us next to the only three other caravans there too. Talk about privacy. No WIFI and mobile reception is patchy. Called “Ocean View” but it’s 20 km from it. More of a tiny hint of ocean if you squint from our spot. Our $50 was better spent in Narooma or one of the other beachside parks where we actually had an ‘Ocean View’. We just needed a place to stay quickly to see Australia Zoo. That’s the only plus about it besides nice grass and a lovely receptionist (closes at 1pm). We should known better. Just didn’t think it would be that bad.

A very quiet peaceful park with friendly helpful staff. The view is very nice from the shared deck, although the trees are growing up. The amenities are very simple, a little outdated in my opinion especially for the price for a powered site. An easy spot to stay prior to exploring the glasshouse mountains.
beautiful views, lovely quiet park, very friendly manager

Wir haben mit einem Motorhome und drei Campervans übernachtet. Saubere Badezimmer, beide Anschlüsse und nette Anbieterin. Wir konnten spontan buchen und haben gesagt, dass der Campingplatz einer der besten war.
Nice little caravan park. Basic but clean facilities and good host. Would stay again
Nice spot.

Early check in then prepared for attending a wedding. Reception was well prepared for the wedding guests. Villa was absolute perfection. As new condition. Great layout and amenities for either short or longer stays. Clean, neat, tidy. Could not fault. Reasonably priced given its location and the quality. Unfortunately, WiFi is not provided but managed without for 1 night.

Stayed here overnight in our own caravan. Great spot.
Amazing views.
Host Kellie is terrific, very helpful, and friendly.
Amenities very clean and spacious.
Didn't use laundry but seemed like a few machines and dryers.
Magnificent views from this park set in the hills above Landsborough, small park
Expensive rates $156 for 3nights in a powered site is ludicrous...
nice park clean shower / toilet blocks
Lovely caravan park. Very clean and tidy. Well maintained. The view from our powered site was spectacular.
Friendly staff and close to everything including Australia Zoo
Very clean and tidy facilities. Great atmosphere.

The cabin price was a tad on the expensive side.  We have travelled through Qld and this was $20 per night more than the next highest. It was quiet and the bed comfortable and very neat and tidy.  Clean room. Would stay here again.
Great view and clean anenties
Amenities are old and in need of an update.  Also there is only a few lights in ladies toilets that work and it is very dark.  But for a stop over it is ok.

Just disappointed with this place. Refunds policy was the worst, and when you're sick and need to cancel they are just unhelpful and will not refund anything if you are less than 10 days out from your booking.
Old.
